mapper.select: SELECT A.USER_SEQ, A.USER_ID, A.USER_NAME, A.USER_LEVEL, A.CASH_BALANCE, A.userAssetRank, COALESCE(L.userLssnCnt, 0) AS userLssnCnt, COALESCE(L.userLssnRank, 0) AS userLssnRank FROM (SELECT U.USER_SEQ, U.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, U.USER_LEVEL, UA.CASH_BALANCE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY UA.CASH_BALANCE DESC ) AS userAssetRank FROM USERS U LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT UA ON UA.USER_SEQ = U.USER_SEQ) A LEFT JOIN (SELECT U.USER_SEQ, COUNT(UQR.RESULT_SEQ) AS userLssnCnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(UQR.RESULT_SEQ) DESC,U.CREATED_AT DESC) AS userLssnRank FROM USERS U LEFT JOIN USER_QUESTION_RESULT UQR ON UQR.USER_SEQ = U.USER_SEQ AND UQR.FINISHED_AT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY U.USER_SEQ, U.CREATED_AT) L ON A.USER_SEQ = L.USER_SEQ WHERE A.USER_SEQ = #{userSeq};

SELECT U.USER_SEQ, U.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, U.USER_LEVEL, UA.CASH_BALANCE, COUNT(UQR.RESULT_SEQ) AS userLssnCnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY CASH_BALANCE DESC) AS userAssetRank FROM USERS U LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_ACCOUNT UA ON UA.USER_SEQ = U.USER_SEQ LEFT JOIN USER_QUESTION_RESULT UQR ON U.USER_SEQ = UQR.USER_SEQ AND UQR.FINISHED_AT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY U.USER_SEQ, U.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, U.USER_LEVEL, UA.CASH_BALANCE

SELECT U.USER_NAME, U.USER_SEQ, UA.cash_balance, COUNT(UQR.RESULT_SEQ) AS userLssnCnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(UQR.RESULT_SEQ) DESC,U.CREATED_AT DESC) AS userLssnRank FROM USERS U LEFT JOIN USER_QUESTION_RESULT UQR ON U.USER_SEQ = UQR.USER_SEQ AND UQR.FINISHED_AT IS NOT NULL LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT UA ON U.USER_SEQ = UA.user_seq GROUP BY U.USER_SEQ, U.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, U.USER_LEVEL, UA.CASH_BALANCE
SELECT COUNT(USER_SEQ) AS totUserCnt FROM USERS;
